/home/dev/cv2/resume/data.typ.note: Tailored CV for fonio GTM Engineer 2026-06-15 (draft, CV-only, no cover letter, not yet submitted); supersedes ENPULSION snapshot at the same source path (prior hash 4159f41d → 1306c4d4). 5-bullet Stackgini rewritten for GTM Engineer seat: bullet 1 combines $20K → $1M+ scale with DAX40/F500 customer roster (SAP, REWE, Siemens, Danaher); bullet 2 reframes ABM data layer as a Europe-wide ICP scoring database (NOT in-house Clay/Apollo equivalent — architecture-accurate retirement of prior framing) sourcing signals via SERP APIs / AI web research / firmographics APIs / Fiber.ai LinkedIn data; bullet 3 is ICP-driven prospecting agent on Fiber.ai LinkedIn detail integrated into HubSpot; bullet 4 frames cold-email as a Claude Code workspace orchestrating scraping/enrichment/sequencing/messaging/analytics/tracking across HubSpot/Apollo/Lusha/custom data-quality layer ($75K/mo = 0.5 SDRs); bullet 5 is SDR team-build + quarterly cadence with CRO/CEO. Five of six JD-named tools surface verbatim (HubSpot, Apollo, Lusha, Instantly, Clay-adjacent ICP DB); PhantomBuster and Smartlead held as not-used. Dropped from prior snapshots: product/CS pivot bullet, funnel/channel analytics bullet, fundraising-support bullet, C/VP exec-audience bullet, US F500 / SAP LeanIX channel bullet. Luther reduced to one bullet each (CIO office + ISO 27001 ISMS; CFO office + German GAAP). https://www.enpulsion.com/careers/positi.topic: ENPULSION CEO Associate (Chief of Staff), Vienna-Schwechat job description
https://www.enpulsion.com/careers/positi.note: Verbatim JD pasted by user 2026-06-13. Permanent CEO-orbit execution-partner seat at Vienna-area space-tech scaleup (modular FEEP propulsion for SmallSats, founded 2016, VIE Airport City office). Pillar weighting ~30% decision-to-execution / ~25% cross-functional coordination / ~20% executive materials / ~15% lightweight process design / ~10% CEO proxy. Most off-commercial seat tracked (~15-20% commercial per mark-progression-over-direction filter), bigger directional swing than FMV / Allocator One / Vendure / ElevenLabs. Comp floor €3,415.01 × 14 ≈ €47,810; realistic range €55-75K with overpayment. Yellow flag: 'advanced PowerPoint and presentation skills' named twice — possible deck-monkey shape risk needs screen-level diligence. First verified JD for the Tier 1.5 'Founders Associate / Chief of Staff' role-pattern previously logged as monitoring tier in synthesis/mark-job-direction-map.

https://www.fonio.ai/en/careers?ashby_ji.topic: fonio GTM Engineer (Remote / Vienna) job description
https://www.fonio.ai/en/careers?ashby_ji.note: Verbatim JD pasted by user 2026-06-15 (original German). Named GTM Engineer seat at DACH AI-telephony scaleup (Vienna HQ; 7.5K+ customers, >€5M ARR, ~30% MoM growth, €30M EOY target). Comp €65–95K cash band, equity not disclosed, 100% remote. CTO Matthias named in interview process. Tool stack named verbatim (Clay, Apollo, HubSpot, Instantly, Smartlead, PhantomBuster) matches Mark's [[skills/ai-powered-sales-tooling]] day-job stack — strongest stack-match of any JD tracked. Pillar weighting ~30% lead-gen workflow construction / ~20% lead enrichment via APIs / ~20% outbound campaign development / ~15% AI-driven sales+marketing automation / ~10% funnel-conversion analytics / ~5% product feedback loop. Calibration: ~95% commercial, ~5% off — most-commercial seat tracked, tied with ElevenLabs Growth Generalist (~90%). First verified JD for the Tier 3 'GTM Engineer / RevOps Eng' role-pattern in synthesis/mark-job-direction-map. Interview-odds estimate ~35-50% to first screen. Yellow flag: progression path beyond IC GTM-Eng not signalled in JD. Stretch: SMB-volume outbound mechanics vs intra-IT enterprise motion; voice-AI domain zero reps; equity not disclosed. 'World's first fully automated CRM' framing ambiguous between roadmap commitment and recruiter ambition.

research:elevenlabs-deep-dive-2026-06-09.topic: ElevenLabs Growth Generalist company + org + application-angle deep-dive
research:elevenlabs-deep-dive-2026-06-09.headline_finding: Growth Generalist is the horizontal floater on Luke Harries's Growth umbrella next to four regional/product B2B marketers (NA, UK/I, ElevenCreative, France) plus Head of Performance Marketing. Hiring filter is engineer-operator (Luke = ex-PostHog interim Head of Product / YC HealthTech co-founder / Microsoft Research RL), not marketer-pedigree. Carles Reina (VP Revenue, first GTM hire, employee #4) runs 20x quota rule; scaled $0 → $330M ARR in 3 years; now $500M+. Targeting IPO in 2-3 years. Calibration ~25-35% interview odds; recommendation: apply.

https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/remotec.note: Verbatim JD pasted by user 2026-06-21 from Greenhouse ATS. GTM Strategy seat at Remote (global-employment/EOR platform; fully remote, async, AI baked into every role's requirements). Strategic-business-partner-to-GTM-leaders shape: internal strategy consultant / BizOps embedded in the GTM org. Reports to Head of GTM Strategy; remit (Marketing/Sales/Partnerships) assigned post-hire. 100% remote, EMEA+Americas prioritized. Geo-ranged comp $52.6K–$147.95K USD. Pillar weighting ~35% strategic business partnering / ~25% structured analysis→recommendation / ~20% commercialization support / ~15% cross-functional initiative leadership / ~5% (pervasive) exec influence. Consulting-style loop: recruiter → HM → take-home case study → live case defense to SVP Revenue/Strategy/RevOps + Head of GTM Strategy → VP Growth Marketing or GM Partnerships → bar raiser → employment verification. Calibration ~75% commercial / ~25% off (strategic-analytic mode). FIRST verified JD for Category 8 'Strategy & Ops / BizOps' in synthesis/mark-job-direction-map. Direct sibling of references/anthropic-gtm-strategy-ops-dach-jd but MUCH more applyable: OR-branch qualifier ('strategic role in a high-growth scale-up') is satisfied by Stackgini founding-GTM, sidestepping Anthropic's 10+-years wall; AI-fluency requirement is Mark's edge. Interview-odds estimate ~20-30% to first screen. Biggest risk axis: consulting-case muscle (take-home + live defense) is Mark's least-practiced skill; the case study is the whole game. Stretch: strategist-vs-operator framing gap, no C-level reps at scale, 'extensive experience' reads senior (junior-end applicant), EOR domain zero reps.
